Poker Hand #RC1000001: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:00:00
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Hero ($2 in chips)
Villain1: posts small blind $0.01
Hero: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ks Kh]
Villain1: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.01) returned to Hero
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected $0.02 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.02 | Rake $0 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: Hero (big blind) collected ($0.02)
